files.patch:
@@ -20,7 +20,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: tests
         run: cargo test
       - name: benches (run, quick)
-        run: cargo bench --bench runtime_perf --bench search_perf --bench index_perf -- --sample-size=10 --warm-up-time 0.05 --measurement-time 0.2
+        run: cargo bench --bench runtime_perf --bench search_perf --bench index_perf -- --sample-size=10 --warm-up-time=0.05 --measurement-time=0.2
       - name: Install UBS
         run: |
           curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh?$(date +%s)" \
